title: lysimachia iniki
intro: Lysimachia iniki, also known as the Hawaiian tea plant or mountain tea, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Lysimachia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lysimachia iniki include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Lysimachia iniki can be consumed as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, with the dried leaves and flowers typically steeped in hot water to make a soothing and flavorful tea.
